title: La Opala Digital Technologies is Hiring: Floor Manager (Senior)

jsonLd.title: La Opala Digital Technologies is Hiring: Floor Manager (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
La Opala Digital Technologies is actively seeking a talented and motivated Floor Manager to join our dynamic team in Visakhapatnam. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About La Opala Digital Technologies:
La Opala Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with La Opala Digital Technologies!
